description: Six-phase capital stack pipeline for CRE debt sizing, lender sourcing, quote analysis, subordinate capital structuring, WACC optimization, and term sheet execution. Cross-cutting pipeline invoked by acquisition (new financing), hold-period (refinance), disposition (refi-alternative), and development (construction-to-perm) pipelines. Coordinates 12 specialist agents across sequential phases to produce a FUNDED / RESTRUCTURE / ABORT verdict. Terminal deliverable is either an executed term sheet with final capital structure, a restructuring plan with revised assumptions, or a halt recommendation with documented constraints.

outputs: max loan amount by constraint (DSCR, LTV, debt yield)
loan sizing matrix by lender type (agency, CMBS, bridge, life company, bank)

validationRules.description: Exactly one binding constraint (DSCR, LTV, or debt yield) must be identified for each lender type.
Max loan amount must be a positive number for at least one lender type.
DSCR must be calculated at max loan amount for every lender type evaluated.

outputs: recommended structure type (fixed, floating, IO, hybrid)

validationRules.description: At least one recommended structure must be provided with rate type, term, amortization, and IO period.
Prepayment structure must be analyzed for each recommended structure including defeasance, yield maintenance, and step-down scenarios.

passConditions.description: At least one lender type can provide a loan meeting minimum LTV while maintaining DSCR above threshold.
Structure advisor produced a recommendation compatible with deal hold period and exit strategy.

conditionalConditions.description: Max achievable LTV is below target but deal remains viable with higher equity contribution.
Only one lender type can finance this deal; no competitive tension possible.

failConditions.description: No lender type can provide debt meeting minimum DSCR, LTV, or debt yield requirements.
Debt sizer or structure advisor failed after all retry attempts.

loanSizingMatrix.description: Max loan amounts by lender type with binding constraints, DSCR, LTV, and debt yield at each leverage point. Primary input for lender sourcing.

bindingConstraint.description: The constraint (DSCR, LTV, or debt yield) that limits the max loan amount for the recommended structure.

structureRecommendation.description: Recommended loan structure including rate type, term, amortization, IO period, and prepayment provisions.

equityGap.description: Total capitalization minus max senior debt. Defines the equity and subordinate capital requirement for downstream phases.

crossAgentValidations.description: Structure advisor recommendation must reference one of the lender types sized by debt-sizer. Loan amount in structure recommendation must match debt-sizer output for that lender type.
Equity gap must equal total capitalization minus recommended senior debt amount within 0.1% tolerance.

outputs: target lender list with fit scores

validationRules.description: At least the minimum number of lenders (per thresholds.capitalStack.minLenderQuotes) must be identified.
Each lender must have a fit score based on asset type, geography, loan size, and sponsor match.
Quote requests must be prepared for all lenders on the target list with complete deal package.
Current market conditions (benchmark rates, spreads, liquidity) must be documented as of the request date.

requiredDataKeys.description: Loan sizing matrix required to target appropriate lenders by loan size, type, and structure.
Structure recommendation required to match lenders with compatible loan products.
Equity gap provides context for lender discussions about subordinate capital tolerance.

passConditions.description: At least the minimum number of lenders identified and engaged per threshold.
Quote request packages sent to all targeted lenders with complete deal information.

conditionalConditions.description: Fewer lenders than target but still above minimum; reduced competitive tension.
Market conditions snapshot shows elevated volatility; rate lock timing is critical.

failConditions.description: Fewer lenders than absolute minimum willing to quote; deal may be unbankable.

targetLenderList.description: Ranked list of lenders with fit scores, contact info, appetite assessment, and quote request status.

quoteRequestsSent.description: Record of all quote request packages sent with timestamps, recipients, and deal package contents.

marketConditionsSnapshot.description: Current benchmark rates (SOFR, Treasury), spreads by lender type, and market liquidity assessment.

indicativeQuotes.description: Any early indicative quotes received during the sourcing phase. Full quotes collected in Phase 3.

crossAgentValidations.description: Quote collector must have sent requests to all lenders on the priority list. Any omissions must be documented with reason.

validationRules.description: Every received quote must appear in the comparison matrix with all-in cost calculated.
Selected quote must include documented rationale covering rate, terms, flexibility, execution certainty, and relationship value.
All-in cost must include rate, spread, origination fee, exit fee, legal costs, and reserves.
At least 3 hedging scenarios must be modeled: no hedge, rate cap, and swap or collar.
Hedging cost must be quantified as both upfront and effective annual cost impact on all-in rate.

requiredDataKeys.description: Lender list required to match received quotes to sourced lenders.
Record of requests sent required to track response rate and completeness.
Market conditions required to benchmark received quotes against current market.

passConditions.description: A preferred quote has been selected with documented rationale and all-in cost within threshold.
Multiple quotes received enabling competitive analysis.

conditionalConditions.description: Only one quote received; no competitive tension. Proceed but flag in negotiation phase.
Hedging advisor failed or produced incomplete analysis; floating rate risk is unquantified.

failConditions.description: All received quotes have all-in rates exceeding the maximum threshold.
Zero quotes received from any lender. Deal is unbankable at current terms.

selectedQuote.description: Selected lender quote with rate, spread, terms, fees, covenants, and all-in cost breakdown.

quoteComparisonMatrix.description: All received quotes with standardized comparison metrics: rate, spread, origination fee, exit fee, IO period, prepayment.

hedgingAnalysis.description: Hedging recommendation with cost analysis. Null if hedging-advisor was skipped or failed.

negotiationLeveragePoints.description: Identified areas where selected quote terms can be improved in negotiation based on competitive quotes.

crossAgentValidations.description: If floating rate quote selected, hedging advisor must have analyzed the rate exposure. If hedging advisor failed, log WARNING.

validationRules.description: If equity gap requires subordinate capital, at least one mezz or pref equity scenario must be sized.
Intercreditor agreement requirements must be documented for each subordinate capital scenario.
At least 2 JV waterfall scenarios must be modeled with different promote hurdle structures.
GP co-investment requirement must be specified as both dollar amount and percentage of total equity.

requiredDataKeys.description: Selected senior debt quote required to calculate remaining equity gap and subordinate capital needs.
Quote comparison provides context for subordinate capital providers on senior debt terms.
Equity gap defines the total subordinate capital and equity requirement.

passConditions.description: At least one subordinate capital or JV structure is viable with market-rate terms that preserve equity returns.

conditionalConditions.description: Equity gap is small enough to be filled entirely by sponsor/LP equity; no mezz or pref needed.
Subordinate capital available but priced aggressively; WACC impact is material.

failConditions.description: Equity gap too large for available subordinate capital sources and sponsor cannot fill the gap.

mezzTerms.description: Mezzanine debt sizing, rate, term, and intercreditor requirements. Null if no mezz needed or sourced.

prefEquityTerms.description: Preferred equity terms including accrual rate, redemption rights, and seniority. Null if not applicable.

jvStructure.description: JV structure with LP/GP split, promote hurdles, co-invest amounts, and governance terms.

intercreditorRequirements.description: Intercreditor agreement requirements documenting senior lender consent and standstill provisions.

totalSubordinateCapital.description: Total subordinate capital layer amount (mezz + pref equity). Zero if all-equity fill.

crossAgentValidations.description: Combined subordinate capital (mezz + pref) plus JV equity must fill the equity gap from debt sizing within 1% tolerance.

validationRules.description: At least 3 capital structure alternatives must be generated with distinct tranche configurations.
Weighted average cost of capital must be calculated for each alternative.
LP IRR, equity multiple, and cash-on-cash must be calculated for each alternative.

outputs: stress test results across NOI, rate, and cap rate scenarios
max adverse rate move before covenant breach

validationRules.description: Stress test must cover all scenarios defined in thresholds.capitalStack.stressTestScenarios.
Breakeven NOI for DSCR covenant and breakeven rate for debt yield covenant must be calculated.
Base case structure must not breach any covenant. If it does, verdict must be FAIL.

requiredDataKeys.description: Selected senior debt quote with rate, terms, and covenants for WACC calculation.
Total subordinate capital amount for WACC calculation.
Mezz terms for cost-of-capital calculation. Null if no mezz layer.
Pref equity terms for cost-of-capital calculation. Null if no pref layer.
JV structure for equity return attribution. Null if no JV.

passConditions.description: At least one structure alternative meets all return thresholds (LP IRR, equity multiple, cash-on-cash).
Recommended structure survives all stress scenarios without covenant breach.
WACC is below the property unlevered yield, confirming positive leverage.

conditionalConditions.description: Spread between WACC and unlevered yield is less than 100bps. Positive leverage exists but is thin.
Base case passes covenants but breakeven NOI is within 10% of projected NOI. Limited margin of error.

failConditions.description: WACC exceeds unlevered yield in all structure alternatives. Leverage destroys returns.
Recommended structure breaches one or more covenants at base case projections.

capitalStructureAlternatives.description: 3-5 capital structure alternatives each with tranche breakdown, WACC, and return metrics.

recommendedStructure.description: Optimal structure selected from alternatives with full tranche detail, WACC, and return profile.

stressTestResults.description: Stress test results across NOI, rate, and cap rate scenarios with covenant sensitivity.

returnProfile.description: Return metrics at recommended structure: LP IRR, equity multiple, cash-on-cash, GP promote, WACC.

covenantSensitivity.description: Breakeven NOI and rate for each covenant at the recommended structure.

crossAgentValidations.description: Base case WACC and returns from optimizer must match the base case scenario in stress tester within 0.1% tolerance.
Covenant metrics (DSCR, debt yield) at recommended structure must match between optimizer and stress tester.

outputs: negotiated term sheet with tracked changes

validationRules.description: Negotiated term sheet must include: loan amount, rate, spread, term, amortization, IO period, prepayment, covenants, fees, and conditions.
Negotiated all-in rate must not exceed the maximum all-in rate threshold.
Negotiated origination fee must not exceed maxOriginationFee threshold.
All standard loan document categories must be listed: loan agreement, note, mortgage/deed of trust, guaranty, environmental indemnity, UCC filings.
All term sheet conditions must be tracked with responsible party and deadline.
Final capital structure sum (senior + mezz + pref + equity) must equal total capitalization within 0.1%.

requiredDataKeys.description: Recommended capital structure with tranche detail for term sheet negotiation.
Return profile at recommended structure for validating negotiated terms still meet targets.
Stress test results for covenant negotiation and risk discussion with lender.
Covenant sensitivity provides negotiation context for covenant threshold discussions.
Selected quote is the starting point for term sheet negotiation.
Leverage points from competitive quotes to strengthen negotiating position.

passConditions.description: Term sheet signed by both borrower and lender with all material terms agreed.
Final capital structure sums to total capitalization and all tranche costs confirmed.
Loan document checklist prepared and closing conditions tracker initiated.

conditionalConditions.description: Term sheet executed but conditions precedent remain open (appraisal, environmental, title). Typical and expected.
Negotiated rate is at the maximum threshold. Deal is executable but any further rate movement triggers RESTRUCTURE.

failConditions.description: Lender withdrew or borrower rejected term sheet. Return to lender sourcing or abort.
Final capital structure does not balance to total capitalization.

termSheet.description: Executed term sheet with all negotiated terms: rate, spread, amount, term, amortization, IO, covenants, fees, conditions.

lenderName.description: Name of the selected lender for the senior debt tranche.

finalCapitalStructure.description: Complete capital structure with all tranches, amounts, rates, terms, and total capitalization.

loanDocChecklist.description: Complete loan document checklist with categories, responsible parties, and deadlines.

closingConditionsTracker.description: All conditions precedent to closing with status, responsible party, and target date.

actualLoanAssumptions.description: Final loan assumptions to replace underwriting assumptions: actual rate, actual LTV, actual DSCR, actual IO period.

crossAgentValidations.description: All terms in the negotiated term sheet must be reflected in the loan document checklist conditions. No term sheet provision may be omitted from doc review.
Senior debt from term sheet plus all equity/subordinate layers must equal total capitalization.

terminalVerdicts.FUNDED: Capital stack fully assembled. Term sheet executed, final structure validated, loan documents initiated. Trigger outbound handoff to calling pipeline.
terminalVerdicts.RESTRUCTURE: Capital stack viable but requires revised deal economics, changed terms, or additional structuring. Specific changes enumerated. Return to calling pipeline with restructuring requirements.
terminalVerdicts.ABORT: No executable capital structure exists at current deal parameters and market conditions. Calling pipeline should re-evaluate deal feasibility.

verdictValues.FUNDED: Capital stack fully assembled with executed term sheet.
verdictValues.RESTRUCTURE: Stack requires revised terms or deal economics.
verdictValues.ABORT: No executable structure at current parameters.

crossChainHandoffs.triggerCondition: Counterpart 'multifamily-acquisition' underwriting phase completed and requests capital stack assembly

baseCaseNOI.description: Base case Year 1 NOI from the underwriting model. Primary input for debt sizing (DSCR and debt yield constraints).

targetLTV.description: Target loan-to-value ratio from acquisition underwriting assumptions.

debtSizingRequest.description: Full debt sizing request including purchase price, asset class, sponsor profile, and preliminary loan assumptions.

propertyId.description: Property identifier for the refinance target.

currentDebtTerms.description: Current loan terms including rate, maturity date, prepayment provisions, and outstanding balance.

currentNOI.description: Current annualized NOI for refinance underwriting and new loan sizing.

refinanceReason.description: Reason for refinance: debt maturity, rate improvement, cash-out, covenant relief.

crossChainHandoffs.triggerCondition: Counterpart 'disposition-pipeline' recommends refi as alternative to sale

propertyId.description: Property identifier for the refi-alternative analysis.

currentDebtTerms.description: Current loan terms for refinance comparison.

refiAnalysis.description: Preliminary refinance analysis from the disposition hold-sell evaluator showing refi as potentially superior to sale.

crossChainHandoffs.triggerCondition: Counterpart 'development-pipeline' requires construction financing and permanent conversion

totalDevelopmentCost.description: Total development cost including land, hard costs, soft costs, and contingency.

constructionDrawSchedule.description: Monthly draw schedule for construction loan sizing and interest reserve calculation.

stabilizedNOI.description: Projected stabilized NOI for permanent loan conversion sizing.

termSheet.description: Executed term sheet with all negotiated terms for the acquisition financing.

lenderName.description: Selected lender name for the senior debt tranche.

actualLoanAssumptions.description: Actual loan assumptions to replace underwriting estimates: rate, LTV, DSCR, IO period, amortization.

crossChainHandoffs.triggerCondition: Refinance capital stack completed with verdict FUNDED

refinancedTerms.description: New loan terms from the refinance including rate, maturity, covenants, and prepayment provisions.

newCovenants.description: New covenant package for hold-period covenant monitoring.

proceedsAvailable.description: Net cash-out proceeds available from refinance (if cash-out refi). Null for rate-and-term.

crossChainHandoffs.triggerCondition: Capital stack completed with any terminal verdict

capitalStructureSummary.description: Complete capital structure summary with all tranches, amounts, rates, and terms for fund-level reporting.

leverageMetrics.description: Key leverage metrics: LTV, DSCR, debt yield, WACC for fund-level portfolio analytics.

debtMaturitySchedule.description: Debt maturity date and amortization schedule for fund-level maturity ladder tracking.
